evals.prompt: Set up analysis_options.yaml to enforce trailing commas, single quotes, and treat missing required parameters as errors. Also integrate dart_code_metrics.
evals.expected_output: analysis_options.yaml with linter rules (require_trailing_commas, prefer_single_quotes), analyzer errors (missing_required_param: error), dart_code_metrics config with max-complexity: 15

evals.prompt: Every time I run build_runner it fails with 'conflicting outputs' errors on generated .g.dart files. How do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Always run: dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs. Explain why: stale generated files from previous runs conflict with new generation. Add this as the project-standard command.

evals.prompt: Set up lefthook to run dart format and flutter analyze automatically before every commit so unformatted code never reaches the PR.
evals.expected_output: lefthook.yml with pre-commit hooks: dart format . --line-length 80 and flutter analyze --fatal-infos --fatal-warnings. Show how to install lefthook and verify it runs.

should_not_trigger: How do I use sealed classes in Dart 3?
Add null safety checks to my repository
Set up a GitHub Actions CI pipeline for Flutter
Write a unit test for the UserBloc
